name: Kounoupithi Stifado (Cauliflower Stifado)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the cauliflower and break into florets.
2. Peel and wash the onions; drain them.
3. Heat the oil in a pot and lightly brown the whole onions.
4. Add garlic to the pot and cook until golden.
5. Stir in the diluted tomato paste, vinegar, rosemary, bay leaf, and peppercorns.
6. Cook for 30 minutes.
7. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil; add cauliflower.
8. Cook the cauliflower for 5 minutes, then drain it.
9. Add the drained cauliflower to the sauce.
10. If needed, add a little water.
11. Scatter peppercorns over the mixture.
12. Cover the pot and simmer until all liquid has been absorbed and only the oil remains (about 30 to 45 minutes).
13. Serves 6 to 8.
